job_description: We are looking for a React Developer with 2+ years of experience in React hooks, Redux, REST APIs, and responsive UI design. Experience with TypeScript is a plus.
Looking for a Node.js engineer with strong knowledge of Express or Fastify, MongoDB, REST API design, and JWT authentication. Experience with microservices is a plus.
Seeking a Machine Learning Engineer with expertise in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, and model deployment using FastAPI or Flask. Experience with NLP is preferred.
Internship for frontend developer comfortable with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and basic React. Must have portfolio projects. Good understanding of responsive design required.
Full stack developer needed with React on frontend and Node.js on backend. Must know SQL and NoSQL databases, Docker, and REST API development.
Contract DevOps role requiring AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins or GitHub Actions, and Linux administration skills.
Part-time React Native developer to build cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android. Must know React, Redux, REST APIs, and native device APIs.
Data analyst role requiring Python, SQL, Excel, Power BI or Tableau. Experience working with large datasets and creating dashboards for business insights.
Looking for a UI/UX designer with strong skills in Figma, Adobe XD, user research, wireframing, and prototyping. Experience with design systems is a plus.
Java developer with Spring Boot, Hibernate, Microservices, REST APIs, and MySQL experience. Knowledge of AWS deployment and Docker containers preferred.
We need a TypeScript and React developer for our fintech platform. Must know React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, REST APIs, and unit testing with Jest.
Backend Python developer needed for healthcare platform. Skills required: Python, Django or FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and REST API design.
AWS cloud engineer for infrastructure management. Must know EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFormation, Terraform, and CI/CD pipelines.
Angular developer with 3+ years experience in Angular 12+, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx state management, and REST API integration.
Software engineering internship for final year students. Basic knowledge of any programming language, data structures, and algorithms required. Training provided.
